text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "services.exe spawned cmd.exe to execute an encoded PowerShell command, created and modified a new service named 'Updater', made an outbound network connection, and modified the 'NdisCap' service. These actions are highly unusual for a legitimate services.exe process and are strong indicators of compromise.",
  "indicators": [
    "process_injection",
    "powershell_execution",
    "encoded_command",
    "service_creation",
    "network_connection",
    "persistence_attempt"
  ]
}
